training_data.granularity: one row per player per completed game

upcoming_slate.granularity: one row per player per upcoming game

season_priors.granularity: one row per player-team aggregate season prior

prizepicks_lines.granularity: one row per player-market line capture

context_updates.granularity: one row per player-game context override

provider_context_updates.granularity: one row per player-game provider context

prizepicks_edges.granularity: one row per player-market edge computation
